executives.name: Jessica Graziano
executives.background: Ms. Graziano was appointed Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer in August 2022. Before joining U. S. Steel, she served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of United Rentals, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Robert Dixon
executives.background: Former CEO of Realogy Holdings Corp. and former executive at PepsiCo.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President & General Manager (Merchant Gases)

executives.name: Susan Carter
executives.background: Susan K. Carter has served as a director since 2020. She previously served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Ingersoll Rand plc from 2013 to 2020.
